def negative_health_probe_executes_full_dependency_workflow():
    rule_id = "health_probe_executes_full_dependency_workflow"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag health checks that run the full production path instead of a cheap signal."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
